description: owner_group -> the sys_user attribute that STAFFS it. The owning_group approver resolves to real people from itsm.sys_user (by role, or department for non-IT teams) — the system of record for org membership — with NO separate roster table or column. Resolution is tenant-scoped at query time and fails safe + observable on a gap. This declarative map is the authoritative bridge until an HR/IdP group sync feeds membership directly; resolve_group_members() is the single seam where that source is swapped, with no change to callers. See APPROVAL_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md Step 2.
